feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Optimizing Data Load for Large Replication Flow Object
entry.content:
Good day All,

I have a quick question regarding the optimization of data loading for a replication flow object containing over 400 million records. The object in question is the CDS view I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA, which includes 348 columns.

We are using replication flows to transfer data from an on-premise S/4HANA system to Datasphere, utilizing an initial + delta load method.

I started the flow on Wednesday, but it stalled and ultimately failed on Thursday night after loading 170 million records out of the expected 400 million. The flow was stopped and then restarted. It is now presenting the following errors in Datasphere and S/4 HANA

SAP Datasphere:

S4 (Transaction code DHCDCMON )

Does anyone have suggestions or experience with optimizing the load process for such a large data set?

Thank you in advance for your guidance!

SAP Datasphere

SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone give Internal Server Error
entry.content:
Hi,
I have followed the below tutorial to expose my S/4HANA system fiori applications to SAP Workzone.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-federation-expose-content.html 
S/4HANA system details:
version : 2023
UI5:
Workzone:1.129.0
S/4HANA:1.120.0.

The apps are visible in Work-zone as tiles, but when I open , it gives "Internal Server error".
Not sure whether the workzone and S/4HANA UI5 versions should be same

1. Workzone

2. After opening the app

3. Network tab

Updated

4. Console error


Updated
Destination details

Design-Time

Runtime

Runtime

entry.title: Custom CDN is not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We are implementing customer CDN on AWS platform the CDN url is working well but when integrated to the SAP S/4HANA not working.

 

After configured the customer CDN, the S/4HANA fiori launchpad URL is not accessible. (see attachment)

 

Kindly suggest?

 

Best


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transporting Profit and Cost Center Hierarchies Created in S/4HANA Using the Manage Fiori App
entry.content:
Good day Expert,
I have created hierarchies in SAP S/4HANA using the Manage Fiori App, sport which I would like to transport to the Quality System. However, I did not receive a prompt to enter a transport request during the hierarchy creation process and can not find any button for the Transport.Could you please advise on how to collect the Profit and Cost Center hierarchies under a transport request?

Thanks!

entry.title: Attainment for Asset Management for Resource Scheduling S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Friends

All steps properly followed for scheduling work in FIORI App Maintenance Scheduling Board: set up work center capacities, dispatch planned work orders and freeze schedule, confirm time and close. Attainment seems to be stuck at 0%. Calculation makes sense Attainment % = Work Completed as Planned / Work Planned * 100, advice?

-your SAP friends

entry.title: Transaction code updated as MB**, even though they are obsolete
entry.content:
Transaction code updated as MB** for the material document posted through BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE / IDOC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Same profile naming in development and quality systems
entry.content:
Hi,
SHD an SHQ were our development and quality systems, but now, we have a new system:
SDH (development system)
SQH (quality System)
So, when we created new role and a new profile is assigned automatically in old systems, this profile name was T-SDxxxxxx (DEV) and T-SQxxx (QAS) respectively.
Now, when we create new roles and profiles automatically in new systems, the profile name begins with same nomenclature T-SHxxxx and it is generating incidents.
Could you please help us with this issue?
Is these any OSS Note to apply? or could you tell us how change the beginning of the profile name T-YYxxxxx?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit
entry.content:
We need a help, to solve a problem.
We need you tell us the steps, exactly, how to transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit. 
We need transport the project the client DH0-650  to DH0-550 and DH0-110. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Feasibility to Process Soap APIs in Background
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are currently using the standard SOAP API - schedgagrmtdlivschedule_in to create, and update delivery schedules of sales scheduling agreements . However the API gets processed immediately once invoked from the middleware. The business requirement here is to not automatically process the payload data rather -
1. To store it in S4 
2. Have the payload validated by business user
3. And then process it after confirmation.
Is it feasible to have such type of scenario in S4 with SOAP APIs to hold the data before posting/processing? to give a better understanding we can think and visualize how Inbound Idocs work where we have an option to select "Trigger Immediately" or "Trigger by Background Program" .
Constraints: Stopping/storing in Middleware is not recommended by client

entry.title: System is looking for the wrong PA Transfer Structure during production order settlement
entry.content:
Hello

I have created a production order and maintained the PA transfer structure "Z1" under "Settlement parameters". The PA Transfer structure is set by default according to the production order type.

But when I am executing the variance settlement (KO88/CO88), I am getting the following error message "Complete PA transfer structure FI"(KD514) even though I maintained the structure as "Z1".

I don't understand why the system is looking for "FI" instead of "Z1"

Can you please help me on this topic ?

Many thanks,

Regards,

Maxime

entry.title: replicating S/4 VDM models in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

Given that there is a vast array of CDS views and Queries withing SAP S/4 VDM, is it necessary to recreate similar models in Datasphere?  It sounds like a duplication of effort.  What do you all think?  What would be the best practice in this regard?  As you know, SAP SAC provides live connection to S/4 for reporting utilizing the vast array of built-in CDS Analytical Queries.   There must be a blog on this subject, but I cannot find it.  Let me know if you know of any blogs on this subject.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: notes 3144435 not support S4CORE 108
entry.content:
--- Product/Function ---

No predicted product

User selected product: SAP S/4HANA (Recommended & Recent)

No predicted product function

User selected product function: SAP S/4HANA > Master Data > Material/Product Data Management (Recent)

Predicted component: LO-MD-MM (Product Function)

 

--- TagID/AreaID ---

TagID:

AreaID:

entry.title: How can we have one inspection lot generated for multiple batches during GR for a PO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts. I need your support and feedbacks to get to a solution to meet my clients requirement. 

As per standard SAP, for every batch created during Goods Receipt there is an Inspection lot created but our requirement is for multiple batches created during GR, we want only one Inspection lot to be created.

Is it possible to meet this requirement in standard SAP only with configurations or settings or an enhancement is a must?

Kindly share your thoughts and expert advise.

Note: We do not have EWM and have ruled out any settings related to this. Batch is created manually and have external batch numbering

Regards,

Lenin

entry.title: Block Planning tab has no details for characteristics in PDS view screen | S4 Hana | CURTO_SIMU |
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a query regarding Block Planning with PDS. I have setup a block planning scenario in my system and the blocks are correctly picking the relevant characteristics orders as per the block basis definition maintained, however, when I am checking the PDS with /n/SAPAPO/CURTO_SIMU transaction, I can see that even though the 'Block Planning Class' assignment is shown correctly, the 'Block Planning' tab for the activity is empty and having no values for characteristics. I want to know am I missing any config. or any master data setup is missing here? Please see the attached screenshot for reference.

Appreciate your response in advance.

entry.title: UD Reversal Note - IM and EWM SLOC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need to carryout UD reversal in certain scenarios for stocks taken in IM and EWM locations. Now we are struggling a lot in case of trying to reverse the Material Documents. 

We are in SAP S4 2020 (On Premise).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content:
Hi SAP Masters,

I am a recent SAP S4HANA Public Cloud User with EWM and found out that in SAP universe, when there is an Outbound Delivery created, this reduces our Open Quantity as if this was already shipped, but since it is only created and we are waiting for the truck to arrive, it is a bit misleading to say that the quantity is already delivered, could anyone share any suggestion on how to tackle this simple problem?

We would like to know all real open quantities, not 1 by 1 check.

To be able to check also our real backlog with our customers

entry.title: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity scheduling table/board?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I've been trying to understand how to use the capacity scheduling board and the capacity scheduling table apps in Fiori but I facing an issue. When I click the work center filter on the top, I find it empty whereas there are plenty of work centers in the system. So after doing some research and skimming through this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/did-you-know-this-about-capacity-planning-in-s-4hana/ba-p/13579456 , I've come across the word "Pacemaker work center" but I can't find a clear definition for what exactly is it and what differentiates it from a regular work center. It seems that these apps only show a Pacemaker work center.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Dear all

I would like to download last patch form SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.0 , PATCH 9, HOTFIX 1, but just the patch, to update our server and update all Clients customers.

Can you help me to find this update? Not all SAP GUI packet

 

thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Badi MD_EXT_SUP is not triggered in MD01n - MRP Live
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to update the issuing storage location while transferring the stock between two internal storage locations. Right now in the purchase requisition the issue storage location is shown as blank.

Even after maintaining the special procurement type  config BADI is not triggering. Can you let me know if there is any option to update the issuing storage location in MD01 ?

Regards,

Manoj
